revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Sn crud]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23985667504|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八将神]][[zh:八將神]]
'''Hasshōjin''' (八将神) refers to the eight deities of {{ill|Onmyōdō|en|Onmyōdō|qid=Q1340540|lt=Onmyōdō|1=Onmyōdō}} who govern the fortune and misfortune of directions. They are also known as '''Eight Generals'''. == Overview == In {{ill|folk tradition|ja|民間伝承|1=Folklore|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/folk tradition|13=User:Immanuelle/folk religon|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 伝承|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q36192}}, they are said to be the eight princes of {{ill|Gozu Tennō|en|Gozu Tennō|qid=Q11570247|lt=Gozu Tennō|1=Gozu Tennō}}, whose mother is identified as {{ill|Hari Saijo|ja|頗梨采女|1=Harisai-sho|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hari Saijo|13=User:Immanuelle/Harisai-sho|qq=}}, the consort of Gozu Tennō and daughter of {{ill|Shakara Dragon King|ja|娑伽羅龍王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakara Dragon King|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Since Gozu Tennō is equated with {{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|須佐之男尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}}, some also consider his wife {{ill|Kushinadahime|ja|櫛稲田姫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kushinadahime|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to クシナダヒメ}} as their mother. (See also "{{ill|Toshitokujin|ja|歳徳神|1=Toshitoku-shin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toshitokujin|13=User:Immanuelle/Toshitoku-shin|qq=}}") In {{ill|Rekichū|ja|暦注|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Calendrical Notes|qq=}}, they are as important as Toshitokujin and {{ill|Konjin|en|Konjin|qid=Q6429460|lt=Konjin|1=Konjin}}. Their positions change according to the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|qid=Q1072961|lt=zodiac|1=Earthly Branches}} sign of the year, and their directions influence fortune and misfortune. The base deity is the Great Year Deity (Taisai), who is always located in the direction of the zodiac sign of the year, while the other seven deities are positioned relative to it. == Eight Deities == ; {{ill|Taisai-shin|ja|太歳神|1=Taisaijin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisai-shin|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|qq=}} (Great Year Deity) : Resides in the direction of the zodiac sign of the year. The deified form of the planet {{ill|Jupiter|en|Jupiter|qid=Q319|lt=Jupiter|1=Jupiter}} (木星). Relocation and construction are auspicious, but lawsuits and logging are inauspicious. ; {{ill|Daishōgun|ja|大将軍|1=Daishōgun (directional deity)|lt=Daishōgun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daishōgun|13=User:Immanuelle/Daishōgun (directional deity)|qq=}} (Great General) : The deified form of the planet {{ill|Venus|en|Venus|qid=Q313|lt=Venus|1=Venus}} (太白). Stays in the same direction for three years, causing a period known as "Three-Year Blockage," during which all actions are extremely inauspicious. ; {{ill|Taion-shin|ja|太陰神|1=Taionjin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taion-shin|13=User:Immanuelle/Taionjin|qq=}} (Great Shade) : The deified form of the planet {{ill|Saturn|en|Saturn|qid=Q193|lt=Saturn|1=Saturn}} (鎮星). Unfavorable for engagements and childbirth. ; {{ill|Saigyōshin|ja|歳刑神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saigyōshin|qq=}} (Punishment Year Deity) : The deified form of the planet {{ill|Mercury (planet)|en|Mercury (planet)|qid=Q308|lt=Mercury|1=Mercury (planet)}} (辰星). Farming is inauspicious. ; {{ill|Saiha Shin|ja|歳破神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saiha Shin|qq=}} (Breaking Year Deity) : The deified form of the planet Saturn (鎮星). Moving and traveling are inauspicious. ; {{ill|Saisetsujin|ja|歳殺神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saisetsujin|qq=}} (Killing Year Deity) : The deified form of the planets Venus (太白) or {{ill|Mars|en|Mars|qid=Q111|lt=Mars|1=Mars}} (熒惑星). Inauspicious for engagements but favorable for Buddhist ceremonies. ; {{ill|Ōbanjin|ja|黄幡神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōbanjin|qq=}} (Yellow Banner) : The deified form of the star {{ill|Rahu|en|Rahu|qid=Q950298|lt=Rahu|1=Rahu}}. Auspicious for martial arts but inauspicious for relocation and construction. ; {{ill|Hyōbijin|ja|豹尾神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōbijin|qq=}} (Leopard Tail) : The deified form of the star {{ill|Ketu|ja|計都|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ketu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ケートゥ|1=Ketu (mythology)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1367259}}. Fierce like a leopard, inauspicious for acquiring livestock and even for using restrooms. <gallery> Image:God of Taisai.png|Great Year Deity (Taisai) Image:God of Daishōgun.png|Great General (Daishōgun) Image:God of Taion.png|Great Shade (Taiōn) Image:God of Saikei.png|Punishment Year Deity (Saikyō) Image:God of Saiha.png|Breaking Year Deity (Saiha) Image:God of Saisatsu.png|Killing Year Deity (Saisatsu) Image:God of Ooban.png|Yellow Banner (Ōban) Image:God of Hyobi.png|Leopard Tail (Hyōbi) </gallery> == Zodiac Signs and Directions of the Eight Deities == [[File:24directions.png|thumb|250px|Directions]] {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center" |- ! Zodiac Sign !! Rat !! Ox !! Tiger !! Rabbit !! Dragon !! Snake !! Horse !! Goat !! Monkey !! Rooster !! Dog !! Pig |- ! Great Year Deity (Taisai) | Rat || Ox || Tiger || Rabbit || Dragon || Snake || Horse || Goat || Monkey || Rooster || Dog || Pig |- ! Great General (Daishōgun) | Rooster || Rooster || Rat || Rat || Rat || Rabbit || Rabbit || Rabbit || Horse || Horse || Horse || Rooster |- ! Great Shade (Taiōn) | Dog || Pig || Rat || Ox || Tiger || Rabbit || Dragon || Snake || Horse || Goat || Monkey || Rooster |- ! Punishment Year Deity (Saikyō) | Rabbit || Dog || Snake || Rat || Dragon || Monkey || Horse || Ox || Tiger || Rooster || Goat || Pig |- ! Breaking Year Deity (Saiha) | Horse || Goat || Monkey || Rooster || Dog || Pig || Rat || Ox || Tiger || Rabbit || Dragon || Snake |- ! Killing Year Deity (Saisatsu) | Goat || Dragon || Ox || Dog || Goat || Dragon || Ox || Dog || Goat || Dragon || Ox || Dog |- ! Yellow Banner (Ōban) | Dragon || Ox || Dog || Goat || Dragon || Ox || Dog || Goat || Dragon || Ox || Dog || Goat |- ! Leopard Tail (Hyōbi) | Dog || Goat || Dragon || Ox || Dog || Goat || Dragon || Ox || Dog || Goat || Dragon || Ox |}
== See Also == * {{ill|Direction Gods|ja|方位神|1=Directional deity|1=Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Direction Gods|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|qq=}} * {{ill|Navagraha|en|Navagraha|qid=Q1078632|lt=Nine Luminaries|1=Navagraha}} * {{ill|Hachiōji Shrine|ja|八王子神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiōji Shrine|1=Hachioji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11391618}} == External Links == * [https://web.archive.org/web/20130122170940/http://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/kotoba/02_eto03.html National Diet Library "Words in the Calendar"] == References == * ''Onmyōdō no Hon: Secret Rites and Genealogy of Divination in Japanese History.'' {{ill|Gakken|en|Gakken|qid=Q2664679|lt=Gakken Holdings|1=Gakken}}, 1994. ISBN 978-4056000818
==merge == '''Hasshōjin''' (八将神) refers to the eight deities of [[Onmyōdō]] who govern the auspicious and inauspicious directions. They are also called the '''Eight Generals''' (八将軍). == Overview == In {{ill|Folklore|en|Folklore|qid=Q36192|lt=Folklore|1=Folklore}}, they are said to be the eight princes of {{ill|Gozu Tennō|en|Gozu Tennō|qid=Q11570247|lt=Gozu Tennō|1=Gozu Tennō}}, with their mother being Harisaijo (頗梨采女), the daughter of the {{ill|Eight Great Dragon Kings|ja|八大竜王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Naga King Sagara|qq=}} and consort of Gozu Tennō. Alternatively, because Gozu Tennō is often identified with {{ill|Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|須佐之男命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}}, their mother is sometimes considered to be {{ill|Kushinadahime|ja|櫛稲田姫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kushinadahime|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to クシナダヒメ}}. (See also: [[Toshigami]]) In [[calendar annotations]] (暦注), they hold significant importance alongside {{ill|Toshigami|ja|歳徳神|1=Toshitoku-shin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toshigami|13=User:Immanuelle/Toshitoku-shin|qq=}} and {{ill|Konjin|en|Konjin|qid=Q6429460|lt=Konjin|1=Konjin}}. Each deity changes their position annually according to the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|qid=Q1072961|lt=Chinese zodiac|1=Earthly Branches}}, influencing directional auspices. The primary deity, {{ill|Taisai-shin|ja|太歳神|1=Taisaijin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisai-shin|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|qq=}}, resides in the zodiac direction of the year, with the other seven deities positioned correspondingly. == The Eight Deities == ; {{ill|Taisai-shin|ja|太歳神|1=Taisaijin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisai-shin|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|qq=}} (たいさい) : Resides in the direction of the year's zodiac. A deity representing the celestial body {{ill|Jupiter|en|Jupiter|qid=Q319|lt=Jupiter|1=Jupiter}}. Moving house or construction is auspicious; however, litigation and tree cutting are inauspicious. ; {{ill|Daishōgun|ja|大将軍|1=Daishōgun (directional deity)|lt=Daishōgun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daishōgun|13=User:Immanuelle/Daishōgun (directional deity)|qq=}} (たいしょうぐん/だいしょうぐん) : Represents {{ill|Venus|en|Venus|qid=Q313|lt=Venus|1=Venus}}. This deity remains in the same direction for three years, leading to the belief in "Three-Year Blockage" (三年塞がり), during which all activities are considered highly inauspicious. ; {{ill|Taion-shin|ja|太陰神|1=Taionjin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taion-shin|13=User:Immanuelle/Taionjin|qq=}} (たいおん) : Represents {{ill|Saturn|en|Saturn|qid=Q193|lt=Saturn|1=Saturn}}. Engagements and childbirth are deemed unfavorable. ; {{ill|Saigyō|ja|歳刑神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saigyō|1=Saigyōshin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q130423}} (さいぎょう/さいけい) : Represents {{ill|Mercury (planet)|en|Mercury (planet)|qid=Q308|lt=Mercury|1=Mercury (planet)}}. Agricultural activities are considered inauspicious. ; {{ill|Saiha Shin|ja|歳破神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saiha Shin|qq=}} (さいは) : Represents {{ill|Saturn|en|Saturn|qid=Q193|lt=Saturn|1=Saturn}}. Relocations and travel are unfavorable. ; {{ill|Saisetsujin|ja|歳殺神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saisetsujin|qq=}} (さいせつ) : Represents either Venus or {{ill|Mars|en|Mars|qid=Q111|lt=Mars|1=Mars}}. While engagements are inauspicious, Buddhist ceremonies are considered favorable. ; {{ill|Ōbanjin|ja|黄幡神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōbanjin|qq=}} (おうばん) : Represents the {{ill|Rahu|en|Rahu|qid=Q950298|lt=Rahu|1=Rahu}} star. Auspicious for martial arts but unfavorable for relocations or construction. ; {{ill|Hyōbijin|ja|豹尾神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōbijin|qq=}} (ひょうび) : Represents the {{ill|Ketu|ja|計都|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ketu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ケートゥ|1=Ketu (mythology)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1367259}} star. Known for ferocity akin to a leopard, making livestock acquisition and even excretory activities inauspicious. <gallery> Image:God of Taisai.png|Tai Sui Image:God of Daishōgun.png|Daishōgun Image:God of Taion.png|Taion Image:God of Saikei.png|Saigyō Image:God of Saiha.png|Saiha Image:God of Saisatsu.png|Saisatsu Image:God of Ooban.png|Ōban Image:God of Hyobi.png|Hyōbi </gallery> == Directions of the Zodiac and Eight Deities == [[File:24directions.png|thumb|250px|Directions]] {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center" |- ! Zodiac !! Rat !! Ox !! Tiger !! Rabbit !! Dragon !! Snake !! Horse !! Goat !! Monkey !! Rooster !! Dog !! Boar |- ! Tai Sui | Rat || Ox || Tiger || Rabbit || Dragon || Snake || Horse || Goat || Monkey || Rooster || Dog || Boar |- ! Daishōgun | Rooster || Rooster || Rat || Rat || Rat || Rabbit || Rabbit || Rabbit || Horse || Horse || Horse || Rooster |- ! Taion | Dog || Boar || Rat || Ox || Tiger || Rabbit || Dragon || Snake || Horse || Goat || Monkey || Rooster |- ! Saigyō | Rabbit || Dog || Snake || Rat || Dragon || Monkey || Horse || Ox || Tiger || Rooster || Goat || Boar |- ! Saiha | Horse || Goat || Monkey || Rooster || Dog || Boar || Rat || Ox || Tiger || Rabbit || Dragon || Snake |- ! Saisatsu | Goat || Dragon || Ox || Dog || Goat || Dragon || Ox || Dog || Goat || Dragon || Ox || Dog |- ! Ōban | Dragon || Ox || Dog || Goat || Dragon || Ox || Dog || Goat || Dragon || Ox || Dog || Goat |- ! Hyōbi | Dog || Goat || Dragon || Ox || Dog || Goat || Dragon || Ox || Dog || Goat || Dragon || Ox |} == Related Articles == * [[Directional deity]] * {{ill|Navagraha|en|Navagraha|qid=Q1078632|lt=Navagraha|1=Navagraha}} * {{ill|Hachioji Shrine|ja|八王子神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachioji Shrine|qq=}} == External Links == * [https://web.archive.org/web/20130122170940/http://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/kotoba/02_eto03.html National Diet Library: Directional Deities in Japanese Calendars] == References == * ''The Book of Onmyōdō: The Genealogy of Secret Rituals and Divination in Japanese History.'' Gakken Publishing, 1994. ISBN 978-4056000818
{{translated page|ja|八将神|version=103161414|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[ja:八将神]]
